Sandbox_RGM_StartRarityTweaker_tooltip:
Lower = higher chance of better modifiers.
Higher = higher chance of bad modifiers.

WARNING: 0 = ALL modifiers are LEGENDARY rarity.
Sandbox_RGM_PeakRarityTweaker_tooltip:
Lower = higher chance of better modifiers.
Higher = higher chance of bad modifiers.

WARNING: 0 = ALL modifiers are LEGENDARY rarity.
Sandbox_RGM_AttachedWeaponsChanceMultipl:
For weapons attached to zombies.
Higher = bigger chance of a modifier on zombie weapons.
Sandbox_RGM_RangedWeaponsChanceMultiplie:
For all firearms.
Higher = bigger chance of a modifier on ranged weapons.
Sandbox_RGM_ChanceMultiplierForCraftedIt:
Applies to all crafted items: weapons, bags, clothing, footwear.
Set to 0 to disable modifiers on crafted items.
Sandbox_RGM_IgnoreIrrelevantWeapons_tool: Modifiers won't apply to: pens, spoons, forks, fishing rods, cooking pans, planks, metal bars, metal pipes.
Sandbox_RGM_ItemsTinkerable_tooltip:
Allow tinkering on all item types: melee weapons, ranged weapons, bags and clothing.
Disable to remove the tinkering option entirely.
Sandbox_RGM_DynamicTinkerer_tooltip: Unlocked when Maintenance + Tinkering >= 8 and 15 epic+ modifiers have been tinkered.
Sandbox_RGM_TinkerCost_tooltip: Number of items consumed per tinkering action.
Sandbox_RGM_ClothingModifiers_tooltip:
Enable random modifiers on all wearable items and bags: clothing, shoes, boots and backpacks.
Affects: combat speed, defense, noise, run speed, bag capacity and weight reduction.
Sandbox_RGM_ClothingXPModifiers_tooltip:
Enable XP bonus modifiers on profession-themed clothing (doctor coat, military uniform, mechanic coveralls, etc.).
Legendary-only: +50% XP for the matching skill while worn.
Requires Clothing Modifiers to be enabled for new items to receive this bonus.
